lessons: gws CLI + Forms API surface independently re-verified accurate against upstream (no drift). Skill correctly overrides Google's own stale 'call forms.update' doc text.

Expert CRITICAL fixed this cycle: CES template/script were reverse-scored (1-7 with low=easy/high=hard, 'lower is better'), which both confused the instrument (question asked 'how easy' against an inverted scale) and broke CES-benchmark comparability. Switched to canonical CES 2.0 agreement statement (higher = better).
